reference: My son is a Filipino child. I had him undergo 'tuli', which is a Filipino rite of male circumcision. It has a long historical tradition and is considered a rite of passage. This procedure involves cutting the top foreskin covering the penis. After the 'tuli', my son was walking around the house, and then he told me that his penis is swollen. The swollen part is behind the mushroom or foreskin. What cure can be used, Doctor?
text: My son is a Filipino child. I had him undergo tulis, which is a Filipino rite of male circumcision. It has a long historical tradition and is considered a rite of passage. This procedure involves cutting the top foreskin covering the penis off to the tulis. My son was walking around the house and then he told me that his penis is swollen. The swollen part is behind the mushroom or foreskin. What cure can be used on that?
